prompt: run_band_acc sys port tasks pass total weighted =
completion:
if length tasks == 0 then (pass, total, weighted)
  else
    let task_line = head tasks
    let task = bench_task_desc task_line
    let expected = bench_task_expected task_line
    let _ = print (cat ["  → ", task, if expected == "" then "" else cat [" [expect: ", expected, "]"]])
    let m = arena_mark 0
    let result = try_task sys port task expected
    let _ = arena_reset m
    let passed = is_pass result
    let att = get_attempt result
    let _ = print (cat ["    ", if passed then cat ["PASS (attempt ", show att, ")"] else "FAIL"])
    run_band_acc sys port (tail tasks) (if passed then pass + 1 else pass) (total + 1) (weighted + attempt_score att)

-- GPU unary elementwise dispatch (relu, exp, tanh, sigmoid)
gpu_unop_dispatch op src_data n =
completion:
if gpu_daemon_available 0 then
    let a_str = gpu_format_floats src_data n

    gpu_parse_inline (shell cmd) n
  else
    let _ = gpu_write_floats "/tmp/rail_tg_a.txt" src_data n
    let cmd = join "" (cons gpu_binary_path (cons " " (cons op (cons " " (cons (show n) (cons " /tmp/rail_tg_a.txt /tmp/rail_tg_c.txt" []))))))
    let _ = shell cmd
    let result = gpu_read_floats "/tmp/rail_tg_c.txt" n
    let _ = gpu_cleanup 0
    result

| Tensor t_data t_shape t_st ->
    let n = list_product t_shape
    if gpu_available 0 then
      Tensor (gpu_unop_ffi "tanh_fwd" t_data n) t_shape t_st
    else
      let c = tensor_zeros t_shape
      match c | Tensor c_data _ _ ->

        c

      let db_data = float_arr_new dim 0.0
      let _ = ln_gb_row x_data dy_data dg_data db_data mean_arr rstd_arr dim n_rows 0
      let dg_t = Tensor dg_data (cons dim []) (cons 1 [])

      cons dg_t (cons db_t [])

prompt:
-- ── Outer loop: runs train_loop in 100-step chunks and prints
-- train+val loss between chunks. Weights and Adam states arrive as
-- packed lists so the function fits under the 28-arg arity cap. ──
--
-- weights list index: 0 w_e  1 w_q  2 w_k  3 w_v  4 w_o  5 w_f1 6 w_f2
-- states  list index: 0 we   1 wq   2 wk   3 wv   4 wo   5 wf1  6 wf2
outer_loop x labels x_val labels_val weights states ln_g ln_b pe seq V d d_ff dlog_buf tracker chunk_size total_steps i =
completion:
let start = i * chunk_size
  if start >= total_steps then 0
  else
    let w_e = list_nth 0 weights
    let w_q = list_nth 1 weights
    let w_k = list_nth 2 weights
    let w_v = list_nth 3 weights
    let w_o = list_nth 4 weights
    let w_f1 = list_nth 5 weights
    let w_f2 = list_nth 6 weights
    let st_we = list_nth 0 states
    let st_wq = list_nth 1 states
    let st_wk = list_nth 2 states
    let st_wv = list_nth 3 states
    let st_wo = list_nth 4 states
    let st_wf1 = list_nth 5 states
    let st_wf2 = list_nth 6 states
    let end = start + chunk_size
    let end2 = if end > total_steps then total_steps else end
    let _ = train_loop x labels w_e w_q w_k w_v w_o w_f1 w_f2 ln_g ln_b pe seq V d d_ff dlog_buf st_we st_wq st_wk st_wv st_wo st_wf1 st_wf2 0.02 100 end2 start
    let mk_eval = arena_mark 0
    let t_eval = eval_loss x labels w_e w_q w_k w_v w_o w_f1 w_f2 ln_g ln_b pe seq V d d_ff
    let v_eval = eval_loss x_val labels_val w_e w_q w_k w_v w_o w_f1 w_f2 ln_g ln_b pe seq V d d_ff
    let ratio = v_eval / t_eval
    let _ = print (cat ["step ", show end2, "  train=", show_float t_eval, "  val=", show_float v_eval, "  ratio=", show_float ratio])
    let cur_best = float_arr_get tracker 0
    let _ = if v_eval < cur_best then
      let _ = float_arr_set tracker 0 v_eval
      let _ = float_arr_set tracker 1 (int_to_float end2)
      0
    else 0
    let _ = arena_reset mk_eval
    outer_loop x labels x_val labels_val weights states ln_g ln_b pe seq V d d_ff dlog_buf tracker chunk_size total_steps (i + 1)

  let response = llm_call sys prompt 2
  let lines = split "
" response
  let tasks = filter (\l -> length l > 10) lines
  let _ = print (cat ["  Generated ", show (length tasks), " tasks"])
  let _ = if goal != "" then print (cat ["  Goal: ", goal]) else 0
  let raw_tasks = map (	 -> cat [show level, "	", t]) tasks
  -- For L11+, try to add expected output via OK-pattern
  if level >= 11 then map (add_expected_output sys level) raw_tasks
  else raw_tasks

prompt: linear2 x w b = match x
completion:
| Tensor xd xs xt -> match w
    | Tensor wd ws wt -> match b
      | Tensor bd bs bt ->
        let y = matmul x w
        match y | Tensor yd ys yt ->
          let cols = head (tail ys)
          let n = list_product ys
          let _ = add_bias_loop yd bd cols n 0
          y

eq_chars_loop xs ys =
completion:
if length xs == 0 then length ys == 0
  else if length ys == 0 then false
  else if head xs == head ys then eq_chars_loop (tail xs) (tail ys)
  else false
